articles.title: गृहमन्त्री गुरुङ पारदर्शी भएको कि नाङ्गिएको ?
articles.summary: सरकारी कर्मचारीलाई प्रत्येक १५/१५ दिनमा तलब दिने प्रणाली सुरु गर्ने देशमा नेपाल दक्षिण एसियाकै पहिलो भएको छ ।

articles.title: AI is transforming Nepal’s workplaces. Its classrooms haven’t caught up
articles.summary: While Nepal’s software companies are retraining staff, rewriting job descriptions, and racing to stay competitive, top universities are still debating whether to let students use the tools at all.
